description: Rank venues by cost-effectiveness based on accessibility requirements to support decision-making. The evaluation must identify venues meeting minimum criteria—including level/ramped entry, accessible restrooms, and hearing support—and incorporate standardized venue data and total accessibility cost calculations.

natural_language.prompt: You have messy venue accessibility data for 6 events. Standardize the text descriptions into Yes/No columns, calculate total accessibility costs (including parking, companion tickets, equipment rental), identify which venues meet ALL minimum requirements (level/ramped entry, accessible restroom, AND hearing support), and rank them by cost-effectiveness to help decide which events to attend.
